presenceCondition:
(or (and __STRICT_ANSI__
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)
    (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP))
model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: p is declared at L11 in b62bd7b261b.c but never assigned before `*p = *s` at L24 inside the REGEXP block — genuine null/garbage dereference. No // ERROR, so new bug. PC = (STRICT_ANSI AND CONF AND RENAME AND REGEXP) OR (!STRICT_ANSI AND CONF AND RENAME AND REGEXP) simplifies to CONF AND RENAME AND REGEXP. STRICT_ANSI cancels out. Correctly constrained, no restrictive library macros.
